data.title: Triage Severity Scoring (ESI)
data.description: Implement Emergency Severity Index (ESI Levels 1-5) automated EHR tagging system upon patient intake.

data.title: Bed Allocation Latency Target
data.description: Design real-time alerting to decrease median triage-to-bed time from 48 minutes down to under 18 minutes.

data.title: Digital SBAR Checklist Handoff Protocol
data.description: Deploy mandatory digital Situation, Background, Assessment, Recommendation checklists prior to ward transfer.

data.title: Live Care Journey Tracker
data.description: Provide patients and family real-time mobile app/SMS visibility into lab status, physician rounds, and schedules.

data.title: Interactive Room Transition Map
data.description: Create interactive user interfaces showing patient room transitions between Emergency, Surgery, PACU, and Inpatient Wards.

data.title: Automated Discharge Enablement
data.description: Streamline pharmacy prescriptions, follow-up scheduling, and post-acute transport care options.
